title: Blackstar Shadow
text: Your shadow is darker than the room and heavier than your feet.
flavor: It reaches the exit first and waits there, patient.
trigger: When you would lose Heat from an effect or space.
penalty: Lose 1 less Heat, then gain a note that the shadow has been fed.

effect.text: Blackstar Shadow fed: reduce this Heat loss by 1.

relief: Spend a blackstar or void-salt item to let the full Heat loss resolve.
upside: The first time this scar blocks Heat loss each session, add +1 to your next guile check.
